title: 年忘れディナーショー

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It's show time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer, shall we end this year on a brilliant
note with dinner and an opera?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's New Year's Eve, and T.M. Opera O has
reserved the academy's cafeteria to throw a
party.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Only one reporter came to the press
conference following my debut. Still unthinkable
when I think back on it...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But it's the perfect device. You give the
appearance of an empty house, only for the show
to be revealed as a sold-out hit at the last
moment!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have kept you in suspense long enough! Here I
am, the star of today's event! Let the celebration
begin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Why are you the only one present?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'm here too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O, um... Thank you for everything this past
year...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And Doto?! This pattern is starting to get stale...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Has my rise in popularity remained stagnant the
entire time?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Alas, what a dark turn of events. Woe is me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O's shoulders sink. Well, this lack of
turnout would get anyone down.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How can I still be so unnoticed? The true hero
Lohengrin stands before them, and yet I get
nothing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why do their eyes not turn to this knight of the
holy grail? Perhaps, they are simply unaware? If
that is the case...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I must dominate on the racecourse, and
you must direct my path!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The disappointment doesn't discourage her in the
slightest. That's what I call the heart of a top star.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... Opera O? There's, uh, a certain reason
nobody came today.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Maybe... I mean, at least I think it's because everyone's... over there.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Over there, as in... where?

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Hello, everyone! Welcome to the New Year's Eve
Umamusume Fan Extravaganza!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: And we've got some big names with us today!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
First, two powerhouses from the recent Japan
Cup, El Condor Pasa and Special Week!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hello, hello! Did ya see me knock out the
competition?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I did my real best! I mean, I placed third, but
still...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
Next up, two faces you can expect to see in the
coming Arima Kinen, Grass Wonder and Seiun
Sky!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Merry evening to ya.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! So, they had conspired to throw another
event? Yes, now I see!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A show to celebrate those four of the generation
before mine, the Golden Generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fooled into thinking four is better than one on
numbers alone, fans flocked to that party instead.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Despite me having more appeal than all of them combined.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Wait just a moment. If I were to insert myself
into their gathering...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It would throw their plans off the rails, but they
shall gain something much grander. How
beneficial for everyone!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is settled! I must go, for the greater good—and
to fulfill my duty as a star!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Greetings, one and all!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O... Waaait! Don't interrupt them... It won't
end well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes all the strength we can muster, but
Meisho Doto and I get Opera O to return.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, we have retreated to this castle of silence,
hm?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Those three on the other side have records of
discernible achievement. Naturally, they would
draw a crowd.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But lo! The main actor has only just taken the
stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is high time they make notice of me. I will help
correct their vision.
choice_data_list: Right, let's turn the tables next year.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, Trainer. Have you heard the saying,
"Speak of next year, and the devil will laugh"?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, before the devil has the chance, I'll be the
one laughing instead! Next year, this hall will be
packed to the doors with my fans!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! Aaaaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's way past dinner time. Hopefully the cafeteria is still open.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha hah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Is that... laughter? But whose?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha hah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's... T.M. Opera O?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hard pass. I'll pretend I didn't see anything...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Look at this, a fan in the flesh! One of my
fans has arrived!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Tch! She saw me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, welcome! Eat, drink, and enjoy my solo
show to the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd rather not...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What's this? You're... Admire Vega. You're of my
same generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You look absolutely dreadful. Come, replenish
yourself with my charm. There's plenty to go
around!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Save your breath, really...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with a hapless Admire Vega dragged
along, our final event of the year comes to a cozy
finish.
